certificate.module_name: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance Cryptographic Module (FPR 1000 Series)
certificate.caveat: When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section Life-Cycle Assurance of the Security Policy. The tamper evident seals installed as indicated in the Security Policy
certificate.description: Next generation security services on Cisco Firepower 1000 Series, capable of running multiple (firewall (NGFW), traffic management) security services simultaneously.
